error_signature: No path back to referenced node
title: No path back to referenced node error in if node
symptom: When executing a workflow, n8n throws an error stating 'No path back to referenced node'. This occurs even when the nodes appear to be connected.
applies_when: Nodes are visually connected in the workflow
not_this_if: The error does not occur when executing other workflows
root_cause: This error can occur due to a bug in n8n where the internal references between nodes become corrupted or lost, particularly after modifications to the workflow. Deleting and re-adding the node can refresh these connections.
fix_steps: Delete the 'if' node from the workflow
Re-add the 'if' node to the workflow
agent_instruction: Delete and re-add the 'if' node to refresh its connections.
